title: memecylon calyptratum
intro: Memecylon calyptratum is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae, also known as the megalorachis or megalorachis tree. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Memecylon calyptratum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and treat skin conditions such as acne and wounds. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional medicine to create remedies for various ailments, including fever and skin infections.
